title: Cloud Operations Analyst
description: Dropbox is seeking a Cloud Operations Analyst to help manage our massive-scale cloud infrastructure. You'll work on-site in our Boulder hub, collaborating with world-class engineers to optimize systems that serve millions of users. If you love tackling infrastructure challenges and want to impact how people work, let's talk.
responsibilities: Monitor and optimize cloud infrastructure performance, scalability, and cost efficiency
Respond to production incidents, perform root cause analysis, and implement preventative solutions
Automate operational workflows and build tools to improve engineering efficiency
Collaborate with platform and infrastructure teams to design robust, scalable systems
Implement monitoring, logging, and observability improvements across the stack
Contribute to oncall rotation and maintain service SLAs exceeding 99.99% uptime

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent hands-on experience
skills: Production experience with large-scale distributed systems
Proficiency with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
Strong scripting skills (Python, Go, or Bash)
Experience with infrastructure automation and configuration management
Understanding of networking, storage, and compute concepts
certifications: AWS Solutions Architect Associate or equivalent (preferred)

benefits: On-site work at our Boulder headquarters with mountain views
Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Free lunch, snacks, and beverages on campus
